fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` describes how the four components (R, G, B, A) of a Vulkan image are
mapped to channels for YCbCr conversion. Each field stores a Vulkan `VkComponentSwizzle`
value (as a `uint`). The most common value is `0` (`VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY`), which
means each component maps to the channel of the same name.

This struct is used as part of <xref:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo>.
]]></format>
fields.summary: Describes the component swizzle mapping for a Vulkan YCbCr sampler conversion.

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value for the alpha channel.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the Vulkan component swizzle value for the alpha channel.

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value for the blue channel.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the Vulkan component swizzle value for the blue channel.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all component swizzle values are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> with equal component values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value for the green channel.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the Vulkan component swizzle value for the green channel.

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both values have equal component swizzle values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> values are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two values differ in any component swizzle value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> values are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents right);

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value for the red channel.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the Vulkan component swizzle value for the red channel.
